title: plectranthus shikokianus var. intermedius
intro: Plectranthus shikokianus var. intermedius is a variant of the Plectranthus shikokianus plant, belonging to the Lamiaceae family, and is known for its fragrant foliage and purple flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits associated with Plectranthus shikokianus var. intermedius include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a treatment for wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Plectranthus shikokianus var. intermedius is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of applications.
